title: More (Tide) Angler's Variants
description: Adding variants of Tide's Angling Table, Wooden Crates and its unique Deep Aqua Arrow for all the woods
body:
[![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/asdw9.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide) [![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/ygdgg.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-weapon-variants) [![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/m9rt5.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-fishing-rod-variants) ### More (Tide) Angler's Variants This add-on for [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide) introduces wood variants for the _Angling Table_, _Wooden Crates_, and _Deep Aqua Arrows_1, including all 11 additional wood types. Decking out fishing rods, fishing up loot, or shooting underwater arrows, now all of it can be customized to match your builds and/or your environment. ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/kx5ol.png) A presentation of all (excl. Pale Oak) newly added Wooden Crate and Angling Table variants with the latter having fitting rods from [More (Fishing) Rod Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-fishing-rod-variants) on top. ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/ec92e.gif)![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/qnv28.gif) On the left, a drowned looks at a swiftly approaching **Deep Aqua _Bamboo_ Arrow**1.
                                                                                                    On the right, the player draws their _Cherry Bow_1 ready to shoot a **Deep Aqua _Warped_ Arrow**1. ### Adding 11 new Angling Tables, 11 new Wooden Crates and 11 new Deep Aqua Arrows1 to [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide). 1: Requires [More Weapon Variants (MStV+)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-weapon-variants/) --- [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/1tteu.gif)**]()
